QFrame.default: .QFrame{border-style:solid; border-width:2px; border-color:rgb(139, 139, 139); border-radius:5px; background:qlineargradient(x1: 0, x2: 1, stop: 0 rgb(50, 48, 55), stop: .6 rgb(40, 38, 45));}
